subcodes.first_line: In this day, all enkindled souls who have quaffed from the chalice of divine love and partaken of the ocean of inner meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز جمیع نفوس مشتعله که از کاس محبت الهی نوشیده اند و از بحر معانی قسمت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @high station of learning, @knowledge; recognition of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God
